tools.name: apps.deleteAppsId
tools.description: Deletes the application with the specified application ID.

tools.name: apps.getAccountsAccountIdApps
tools.description: List all applications for the specified account ID.

tools.name: apps.patchAppsId
tools.description: Updates the application with the specified application ID.

tools.name: apps.postAccountsAccountIdApps
tools.description: Creates an application with the specified properties.

tools.name: apps.postAppsIdPkcs12
tools.description: Updates the application's Apple Push Notification service (APNs) information.

tools.name: keys.getAppsAppIdKeys
tools.description: Lists the API keys associated with the application ID.

tools.name: keys.patchAppsAppIdKeysKeyId
tools.description: Update the API key with the specified key ID, for the application with the specified application ID.

tools.name: keys.postAppsAppIdKeys
tools.description: Creates an API key for the application specified.

tools.name: keys.postAppsAppIdKeysKeyIdRevoke
tools.description: Revokes the API key with the specified ID, with the Application ID. This deletes the key.

tools.name: namespaces.deleteAppsAppIdNamespacesNamespaceId
tools.description: Deletes the namespace with the specified ID, for the specified application ID.

tools.name: namespaces.getAppsAppIdNamespaces
tools.description: List the namespaces for the specified application ID.

tools.name: namespaces.patchAppsAppIdNamespacesNamespaceId
tools.description: Updates the namespace with the specified ID, for the application with the specified application ID.

tools.name: namespaces.postAppsAppIdNamespaces
tools.description: Creates a namespace for the specified application ID.

tools.name: queues.deleteAppsAppIdQueuesQueueId
tools.description: Delete the queue with the specified queue name, from the application with the specified application ID.

tools.name: queues.getAppsAppIdQueues
tools.description: Lists the queues associated with the specified application ID.

tools.name: queues.postAppsAppIdQueues
tools.description: Creates a queue for the application specified by application ID. The properties for the queue to be created are specified in the request body.

tools.name: rules.deleteAppsAppIdRulesRuleId
tools.description: Deletes a Reactor rule

tools.name: rules.getAppsAppIdRules
tools.description: Lists the rules for the application specified by the application ID.

tools.name: rules.getAppsAppIdRulesRuleId
tools.description: Returns the rule specified by the rule ID, for the application specified by application ID.

tools.name: rules.patchAppsAppIdRulesRuleId
tools.description: Updates a Reactor rule

tools.name: rules.postAppsAppIdRules
tools.description: Creates a rule for the application with the specified application ID.

tools.name: tokens.getMe
tools.description: Get token details

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
